arts.ttl: Mainz 05 vs. Eintracht Frankfurt preview: Crucial clash in battle for European qualification
arts.sum: Two European hopefuls will face off when Mainz 05 play host to Eintracht Frankfurt in Sunday's Bundesliga encounter.
